name_en: Milk White (Export Product) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25k Large Diamond Quilted Calfskin LP Box Tongue Tongue Bag Black Gold! Play with the new LP Box bag large diamond quilted version🌟🌟 Very classic and atmospheric, the front double C logo is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! The handle has texture, and the chain back adds a casual elegance. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turning heads when worn~ A definite fashion item✓Size: 17x19.5x5cm
